metadata.description: JHoraAI Master Validation Engine Configuration and Workflow Rules

steps.name: User Login
steps.description: Verify active authentication token, user identity session, and route access permissions

steps.name: Select Profile
steps.description: Fetch the target client profile data using a valid profile identifier linked to the user account

steps.name: Choose Profile if Multiple
steps.description: Check if multiple profiles fit the event criteria, prompting user selection when necessary

steps.name: Verify Birth Details
steps.description: Confirm integrity of basic parameters: date, time, latitude, longitude, timezone, and gender

steps.name: Assess Birth Accuracy
steps.description: Determine birth time quality (Exact, Approximate, Rectified, or Unknown) to adjust computation algorithms

steps.name: Verify Required Event
steps.description: Map event type requested to the appropriate functional validation domain

steps.name: Load Required Event JSON
steps.description: Dynamically load specific event rules, significators, and logic boundaries from the designated JSON configuration

steps.name: Determine Astrology Systems
steps.description: Identify systems (KP, Parashari, Jaimini, Western, Nadi, Lal Kitab, Tajik) that are active and necessary for this event

steps.name: Verify API Data Availability
steps.description: Check connection status of astrological computational engines and retrieve availability logs

steps.name: Load Astrology Data
steps.description: Trigger downstream calculation of planetary positions, house cusps, dasha series, and transit tables

steps.name: Validate Houses
steps.description: Verify house boundaries, checking that cusp degree calculations do not overlap or error out

steps.name: Validate Planets
steps.description: Verify planet coordinates, verifying longitudinal values are within 0-360 degrees

steps.name: Validate Cusps
steps.description: Confirm exact coordinates for all 12 cusps along with sign, nakshatra, sub, and sub-sub lord configurations

steps.name: Validate Significators
steps.description: Verify correct grading of planetary significators based on the active structural system

steps.name: Validate Dasha
steps.description: Validate active Vimshottari/Chara dasha chains at target time offsets

steps.name: Validate Transit
steps.description: Confirm coordinate alignments of current moving planets against natal points

steps.name: Validate Current Moon
steps.description: Confirm Moon longitude, Moon Nakshatra, and Moon Sub-lord to establish query context

steps.name: Validate Current Sky
steps.description: Confirm integrity of global real-time planetary positions

steps.name: Validate Timeline
steps.description: Map query time window to specific phases: Past, Present, Near Future, Medium Term, or Long Term

steps.name: Validate Required Profiles
steps.description: Check if extra related profiles (Partner, Ex-spouse, Child, Parents, Lawyer, Third Person) exist when required by the event type

steps.name: Build Evidence Package
steps.description: Compile structured output organizing all Supporting, Conflicting, Missing, and Unavailable indicators

steps.name: Check Evidence Completeness
steps.description: Evaluate if required evidence criteria is met. If yes, proceed to AI. If no, trigger fallback loop

supportedProfiles.description: The primary chart owner requesting the astrological evaluation
Offspring or dependent child of the primary user
An external party relevant to a dispute or event

timezone.description: Valid IANA timezone database entry (e.g., America/New_York, Asia/Kolkata)

modes.ONLINE: Real-time query execution via cloud endpoints
modes.CACHED_DATA: Read-only stored query data within TTL expiration

rules.complianceCheck: Validate event parameters against supporting schema files

supporting.description: Verified high-weight astrological configurations supporting target event occurrence

secondary.description: Ancillary positive linkages reinforcing key trends

conflicting.description: Counter-indicators, challenging transit lines, or house negations

missing.description: Configurations that cannot be calculated or determined given the birth accuracy level

unavailable.description: Data streams or systems deactivated or offline during the validation run

pendingTransit.description: Astrological criteria met except for upcoming key transit confirmations

pendingDasha.description: Astrological criteria met except for activation of future positive dasha periods

pendingProfile.description: Critical secondary profile missing (e.g., spouse birth data needed to evaluate divorce)

strictInputConstraints.explanation: To enforce safety and avoid unstructured processing, AI receives only parsed metadata and the validated Evidence Package. Raw calculations must never be piped directly into the prompt.

errorScenarios.action: Return complete birth-validation checklist to client application, preventing request forwarding.
Check relationship schema. If partner role is required, halt pipeline and prompt client to choose or configure a profile.
Flag transit validation state as critical, postpone trigger check, and queue a background task to refresh transit sky feeds.
Attempt secondary local computation engine fallback, log error warning, and schedule immediate API reconnect retry with exponential backoff.
Halt request processing before AI routing, compile a specific missing-evidence list, and block the LLM call.
Identify missing role definition, suspend event compilation, and transmit a structured profile request back to client.
Gracefully downgrade transaction response, deliver a functional status report outlining missing details, and offer asynchronous report delivery by email.
